## Runtime.Session.ConfectionEditingSessionBase.scaleToYield() method

Scales to a new yield specification. Implementation is type-specific: - Molded bonbons: Frame-based with mold cavity calculation - Bar/rolled truffles: Linear count-based scaling

**Signature:**

```typescript
abstract scaleToYield(yieldSpec: Confections.AnyConfectionYield): Result<Confections.IConfectionYield>;
```

Result&lt;[Confections.IConfectionYield](./ts-chocolate.entities.iconfectionyield.md)<!-- -->&gt;
